english: The most auspicious of all auspicious things, the auspicious, accomplisher of all goals
roman: Sarva mangala mangalye Shive sarva artha sadhike

hindi: शरण्ये त्र्यम्बके गौरि नारायणि नमोऽस्तु ते॥
english: O refuge, three-eyed Gauri, Narayani — salutations to you
roman: Sharanyaye tryambake Gauri Narayani namostu te

english: O devoted to protecting the distressed who take refuge
O Goddess who removes the pain of all, Narayani — salutations
roman: Sarvasya arti hare Devi Narayani namostu te

english: The Goddess who is established in all beings in the form of power
roman: Ya Devi sarva bhuteshu shakti rupena samsthita

english: Salutations to her, salutations to her, salutations to her, salutations again and again
This sacred Durgashtakam — whoever reads it with devotion
roman: Durga ashtakam idam punyam yah pathed bhakti samyutah

english: By the grace of the great Shakti attains all perfections
roman: Maha shakteh prasadena sarva siddhi mavapnuyat
